page.title: Introduction
page.p: This Appendix contains variations and additions to the Building Code of Australia (BCA) which are necessary for its application in Western Australia. For Volume One these apply to:

ul.li: the design and installation of eaves gutters,
building related requirements from the Health (Public Buildings) Regulations 1992 which are consolidated into the Western Australian Schedule of the BCA.

page.p: Note: The Building Regulations 2012 in Western Australia, make other modifications to the BCA. These modifications may change during a BCA cycle, and include:

ul.li: Regulation 15C - the dis-application of the energy efficiency heating and cooling load limits making them voluntary; and
Regulation 15D - a transitional period making NCC Part G5 bushfire construction requirements voluntary for Class 9b primary and secondary schools and early childhood centres until 30 April 2028.

page.p: Refer to the latest Building Regulations 2012 available from www.legislation.wa.gov.au for other modifications.
